name: llm_synthesized_cJSON_to_json-rust_public_v1

parse_valid.description: Parse valid big number JSON strings without error.
parse_valid.normalization: Parsing a valid JSON string returns a non-null (Ok) result.

parse_invalid.description: Parse invalid big number JSON strings returns null (Err).
parse_invalid.normalization: Parsing an invalid JSON string returns null (Err).

parse_opts_handle_null.description: cJSON_ParseWithOpts returns NULL on null input.
parse_opts_handle_null.normalization: Parsing with null/empty input returns error.

parse_opts_empty_string.description: cJSON_ParseWithOpts returns NULL on empty string and sets error pointer.
parse_opts_empty_string.normalization: Parsing an empty string returns error.

parse_opts_require_null_terminated.description: cJSON_ParseWithOpts with require_null_terminated=true rejects extra characters.
parse_opts_require_null_terminated.normalization: Parsing with negative require_null_terminated equivalent: passing extra characters after JSON fails.

parse_opts_incomplete_json.description: cJSON_ParseWithOpts returns NULL on incomplete JSON, sets parse_end.

get_string_value.description: cJSON_GetStringValue returns the string value for strings, NULL for non-strings.
get_string_value.normalization: as_str returns Some for strings, None for non-strings.

get_number_value.description: cJSON_GetNumberValue returns the double value for numbers, NaN for non-numbers.
get_number_value.normalization: as_f64 returns Some(f64) for numbers, None for non-numbers.

create_and_add_bool.description: Add true/false booleans to object and retrieve them.
create_and_add_bool.normalization: Creating an object, adding boolean values, retrieving them returns the correct values.

create_and_add_number.description: Add number to object and verify type and value.
create_and_add_number.normalization: Adding a number and retrieving it yields correct type and value.

create_and_add_string.description: Add string to object and verify type and value.
create_and_add_string.normalization: Adding a string and retrieving it yields correct type and value.

create_and_add_true.description: Add true to object and verify type.
create_and_add_true.normalization: Adding true and retrieving it yields boolean true.

create_and_add_false.description: Add false to object and verify type.
create_and_add_false.normalization: Adding false and retrieving it yields boolean false.

create_and_add_object.description: Add nested object and verify type.
create_and_add_object.normalization: Adding an object and retrieving it yields correct type.

create_and_add_array.description: Add array to object and verify type.
create_and_add_array.normalization: Adding an array and retrieving it yields correct type.

replace_item_in_object.description: Replace an item in object preserves key name.
replace_item_in_object.normalization: Replacing a value under the same key changes the value while preserving key.

delete_item_from_array.description: Delete an item from array does not break list structure.
delete_item_from_array.normalization: After adding items to an array and deleting one, the remaining structure is correct.

typecheck_functions.description: Type-check functions return correct booleans for each type.
typecheck_functions.normalization: Calling is_* on a value of the correct type returns true, false otherwise.

create_array_reference.description: Create array, add item, check types.
create_array_reference.normalization: After creating array and adding a number, is_array and is_number on the item are true.

create_object_reference.description: Create object, add item with case-sensitive key, check types.
create_object_reference.normalization: After creating object and adding a number with a key, is_object and is_number on the item are true.

circular_reference_detection.description: Circular reference detection prevents deep copy.
circular_reference_detection.normalization: Creating circular structure cannot be replicated directly, but array removal works.

delete_item_from_object.description: Delete an item from an object by key, item is removed.
delete_item_from_object.normalization: Removing a key from an object removes it and does not affect other keys.

detach_item_from_object_case_sensitive.description: Detach (remove and return) an item from an object by key (case-sensitive).
detach_item_from_object_case_sensitive.normalization: Removing a key returns the removed value.

has_object_item.description: Check if an object has a given key.
has_object_item.normalization: has_key returns true if the key exists, false otherwise.

print.description: Print a JSON value as a pretty-printed string.
print.normalization: Calling pretty on a parsed JSON value produces a formatted string.

replace_item_in_object_case_sensitive.description: Replace an item in an object under a given key (case-sensitive).
replace_item_in_object_case_sensitive.normalization: Inserting under an existing key replaces the value.

delete_item_from_object_case_sensitive.description: Delete an item from an object by key (case-sensitive) - null safety.
delete_item_from_object_case_sensitive.normalization: Calling remove on a null JsonValue (non-object) returns Null.

detach_item_from_object.description: Detach an item from an object by key (non-case-sensitive) - null safety.
detach_item_from_object.normalization: Calling remove on a null JsonValue (non-object) returns Null.

expected.observable_behavior: parse returns Ok(JsonValue)
parse returns Err
parse returns Err
parse returns Err
parse returns Err
parse returns Err
as_str returns Some for string, None for number and null
as_f64 returns Some for number, None for non-number
insert boolean, get returns correct boolean
insert number, get returns number with correct value
insert string, get returns string with correct value
insert true, get returns boolean true
insert false, get returns boolean false
insert object, get returns object type
insert array, get returns array type
insert again under same key changes value, key preserved

input.case: add items to array then delete one

expected.observable_behavior: after removal, array length and remaining items are correct
is_* returns true only for matching type
is_array true on array, is_number true on item
is_object true on object, is_number true on item
array_remove returns removed value
key is removed, value returned
key is removed, original value returned
has_key returns true for existing key, false for missing
pretty returns a formatted JSON string
new value replaces old under same key
remove on Null returns Null
remove on Null returns Null

_harness_api_audit.heuristic: Identifier-level Rust harness audit. This is not receiver-aware Rust name resolution; mentioned_but_not_declared is an audit signal, while declared_but_not_mentioned is treated as a stronger adapter consistency problem during LLM synthesis.
